homeMetaDescription: Frontend starter template with Nuxt 4, Vue 3, TypeScript and TailwindCSS. Ready template for quick project start.
loginDescription: Log in using email and password. JWT tokens are stored in secure HTTP-only cookies.
protectedDescription: This page uses `middleware/auth`. If the session cookie is missing, you'll be redirected to `/login`.
designSystemMetaDescription: UI components and design patterns for the application.
apiDemoMetaDescription: Demonstration of useApi composable for HTTP calls.
apiDemoDescription: Examples of using the useApi composable to query APIs and UI components.
apiDemoUseApiDesc: Examples of using the useApi composable. Full URLs (http/https) are used as-is, relative paths use the base URL from .env (NUXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE).
error404Description: Looks like this page went for a run. Head back to the home page and continue shopping.
errorDefaultDescription: Try going back to the home page or refresh the page.
creatorMetaDescription: Create your dream sportswear – choose type, material, cut and color.
creatorSubtitle: Configure your dream outfit – step by step
creatorAutoSaveHint: Your choices are saved automatically and restored on your next visit.
creatorOptionLeggingsDesc: Stretchy leggings for yoga and gym
creatorSummaryDemoNote: This is a creator demo – in the full version you can add to cart and place an order.
creatorResetModalMessage: Are you sure you want to reset? All selected options will be lost.
creatorValidationRequired: Please select an option to continue.
categoriesMetaDescription: Browse all product categories in our sportswear shop.
contactMetaDescription: Get in touch with us. Contact form and customer service information.
faqMetaDescription: Frequently asked questions about orders, shipping and returns.
complaintsMetaDescription: Information about returns, complaints and refunds.
aboutMetaDescription: Learn more about Sportswear Shop and our mission.
termsMetaDescription: Terms and conditions of use of our shop.
privacyMetaDescription: How we collect, use and protect your personal data.
cookiesMetaDescription: Information about cookies used on our website.
termsIntro: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of the Sportswear Shop online store. By placing an order, you accept these terms.
termsSection1P1: The online store operates at the address indicated on the website. The store sells sportswear and accessories.
termsSection1P2: Orders can be placed 24 hours a day, 7 days a week through the store's website.
termsSection2P1: Placing an order constitutes an offer to conclude a sales contract. The contract is concluded when we send order confirmation to your email address.
termsSection2P2: We reserve the right to refuse an order in case of lack of product availability or other justified reasons.
termsSection3P1: All prices are given in the currency displayed on the website and include VAT. Shipping costs are calculated at checkout.
termsSection3P2: We accept payment by card, bank transfer, and other methods indicated on the website.
termsSection4P1: Delivery time is 2-5 business days for standard shipping. Express delivery options are available.
termsSection4P2: The customer receives tracking information by email once the order is shipped.
termsSection5P1: You have the right to withdraw from the contract within 14 days without giving a reason. The product must be unused and in original packaging.
termsSection5P2: To exercise the right of withdrawal, contact us. Refunds are processed within 14 days of receiving the returned product.
termsSection6P1: For questions regarding orders and these terms, please use the contact form or email address provided on the website.
privacyIntro: This Privacy Policy describes how Sportswear Shop collects, uses and protects your personal data when you use our website and services.
privacySection1P1: The controller of your personal data is Sportswear Shop. You can contact us via the contact form on our website.
privacySection2P1: We collect: name, email address, delivery address, phone number (optional), order history, and data necessary for payment processing.
privacySection2P2: When you visit our website, we automatically collect: IP address, browser type, device information, and pages visited.
privacySection3P1: We process your data to: fulfill orders, handle complaints, provide customer service, send order updates, and improve our services.
privacySection3P2: Legal basis: contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR), legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR), and your consent where required.
privacySection4P1: Order data is stored for the period required by tax and accounting regulations (typically 5-10 years).
privacySection4P2: Marketing data is stored until you withdraw consent. Log data is stored for a maximum of 12 months.
privacySection5P1: You have the right to: access your data, rectify it, delete it, restrict processing, data portability, object, and withdraw consent.
privacySection5P2: You can exercise these rights by contacting us. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority.
privacySection6P1: We use SSL encryption, secure payment gateways, and appropriate technical measures to protect your data.
cookiesIntro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how we use them on the Sportswear Shop website, and how you can manage your preferences.
cookiesSection1P1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and improve your experience.
cookiesSection2P1: Essential cookies – necessary for the website to function (e.g. shopping cart, session). These cannot be disabled.
cookiesSection2P2: Functional cookies – remember your preferences (e.g. language, region). Disabling may affect site functionality.
cookiesSection2P3: Analytics cookies – help us understand how visitors use the site. Data is anonymized.
cookiesSection2P4: Marketing cookies – used to display relevant ads. These require your consent.
cookiesSection3P1: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies.
cookiesSection3P2: Note: blocking essential cookies may prevent you from using certain features of our website.
cookiesSection4P1: Session cookies are deleted when you close the browser. Persistent cookies remain until their expiry date or until you delete them.
faqIntro: Find answers to the most common questions about our shop, orders, shipping and returns.
faq1Answer: Standard delivery takes 2-5 business days. Express delivery is available and arrives within 24-48 hours. You will receive tracking information by email once your order is shipped.
faq2Answer: Shipping costs depend on the delivery method and destination. The exact amount is calculated at checkout. Orders over a certain value qualify for free standard shipping.
faq3Question: How can I return a product?
faq3Answer: You have 14 days to return a product without giving a reason. The item must be unused and in original packaging. Contact us to initiate a return – we will send you a return label and instructions.
faq4Question: How do I know my size?
faq4Answer: Each product has a size guide in the product description. We recommend measuring yourself and comparing with our size chart. If you're between sizes, we suggest choosing the larger one for a comfortable fit.
faq5Question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq5Answer: We accept credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfer, and other methods displayed at checkout. All payments are processed securely.
faq6Question: Can I change or cancel my order?
faq6Answer: You can change or cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it by contacting us. Once the order has been shipped, changes are no longer possible – you would need to follow the return process.
faq7Answer: Yes, we ship to most European countries. Delivery times and costs vary by destination. International orders may be subject to customs fees in your country.
faq8Question: How can I track my order?
faq8Answer: After your order is shipped, you will receive an email with a tracking link. You can also check the status in your account under 'Orders'.
contactIntro: We're here to help. Reach out to us using the details below or send us a message.
contactAddress: Sportswear Shop Sp. z o.o., ul. Sportowa 15, 00-001 Warsaw, Poland
contactResponse: We usually respond within 24 hours on business days.
